orchestrator.attestation: OpenClaw selected openai/gpt-5.6-sol at xhigh for the JAC-3643 integration session

tasks.spec: You are the economical worker for the post-deployment Ringer canary. In the current task directory, create only canary.json. It must be a JSON object with exactly these string fields and values: status=ready, issue=JAC-3643, pattern=nate-native, authority=executable-check. Do not edit any other file. Do not claim PASS; the executable check decides.
tasks.check: python3 -c 'import json; from pathlib import Path; expected = {"status": "ready", "issue": "JAC-3643", "pattern": "nate-native", "authority": "executable-check"}; actual = json.loads(Path("canary.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); failures = [] if actual == expected else ["canary.json must equal the frozen expected object"]; print("FAIL: " + "; ".join(failures) if failures else "PASS: exact canary object verified"); raise SystemExit(1 if failures else 0)'
tasks.verified: The canary file parses as JSON and exactly equals the four-field frozen object; the check prints a named failure and exits nonzero on drift.
